---
title: "Home"
---

---
title: "Home"
---

::: {.hero-section}
# Uriel Santa Cruz

Statistics & Data Science Student at UCLA

I’m a UCLA student interested in data analysis, machine learning, and using data to solve real-world problems. My work focuses on building clear, useful insights from messy datasets, with experience in Python, R, SQL, Tableau, and statistical modeling.

[View My Projects](projects.qmd){.btn-custom}
[Resume & Contact](resume.qmd){.btn-custom-outline}
:::

::: {.grid}
::: {.card-custom}
## Education
B.S. in Statistics & Data Science  
University of California, Los Angeles  
Expected Graduation: June 2027
:::

::: {.card-custom}
## Interests
- Data science
- Machine learning
- Business analytics
- Data visualization
- Public sector / social impact applications
:::

::: {.card-custom}
## Tools
Python, R, SQL, Tableau, GitHub, Quarto, C++
:::
:::

## Quick Introduction

Welcome to my personal website. This site highlights my background, projects, and interests as I continue building my experience in statistics, data science, and analytical problem-solving. I created this website to share my work with employers, collaborators, and anyone interested in learning more about what I do.

![Professional headshot](images/headshot.jpg){.profile-home}
